title: Blue Canyon Figaro Soap Dish, Resin Dish Soap,Leakage Proof Soap Holder, Clean Soap Dish for Shower, Elegant Textured Design, Easy to Clean Soap Tray for Kitchen Sink for Bathroom, Grey
features: STYLISH & FUNCTIONAL SOAP CASE: This sleek and minimalist soap tray is the perfect combination of style and practicality, designed to keep your soap dry and your space neat while complementing any bathroom or kitchen decor.
DURABLE & LONG-LASTING SOAP TRAY: Made from high-quality, rust-resistant materials such as premium resin, this soap bar holder is built to last and withstand daily use in humid environments.
EASY TO CLEAN SOAP TRAY: The smooth, non-porous surface makes the quick drying soap tray easy to wipe down and maintain. Simply rinse with warm water and mild soap for a quick, hassle-free clean.

VERSATILE & SPACE-SAVING SOAP DISH: Perfect for use with bar soap, shampoo bars, or conditioner bars, this compact soap tray for bathroom fits effortlessly into any space—whether in the bathroom, kitchen, or shower.
ANTI-SLIP BASE: Features a non-slip base to keep the self draining soap dish securely in place, preventing it from sliding around on wet surfaces and ensuring stability even in high-moisture areas.
